metadata.description: 21 evidence-based UX psychology principles — honest persuasion, interaction laws, perception, Nielsen's heuristics — applied to every interface an AI agent builds

plugins.name: ux-psychology
plugins.description: Makes AI agents design interfaces grounded in 21 evidence-based psychology principles: smart defaults, goal gradient, reciprocity, loss aversion, anchoring, Fitts/Hick/Jakob/Miller/Tesler laws, Gestalt, peak-end, Nielsen's 10 heuristics, perceived performance, form microcopy, and trust patterns — with guardrails separating honest persuasion from dark patterns.
